scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/_routes.json','utf8'));const extras=['/journal','/journal/*','/sitemap.xml','/robots.txt'];extras.forEach(p=>{if(!r.exclude.includes(p))r.exclude.push(p);});fs.writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(r,null,2));console.log('_routes.json patched: /journal, /sitemap.xml, /robots.txt added to exclude');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
